ddls:
CREATE TABLE "options_data" (
  "strike_price" REAL /* The strike price for the call option */,
  "call_price_4" REAL /* The call option price for a 4 delta */,
  "call_price_32" REAL /* The call option price for a 32 delta */,
  "close_price" REAL /* The closing price of the underlying asset */,
  "daily_hv" REAL /* The daily historical volatility */,
  "intra_hv" REAL /* The intraday historical volatility */,
  "underlying_asset" TEXT /* The underlying asset symbol */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* The expiration date of the option */,
  "implied_volatility" REAL /* The implied volatility for the option */,
  "delta" REAL /* The delta value of the option */,
  "gamma" REAL /* The gamma value of the option */,
  "theta" REAL /* The theta value of the option */,
  "vega" REAL /* The vega value of the option */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strike_price", "expiration_date")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_activity" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "strike_price" REAL /* The strike price of the traded option */,
  "option_type" TEXT /* Type of option traded (call/put) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of options traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the options were traded */,
  "trade_time" TEXT /* Time at which the trade occurred */,
  "order_type" TEXT /* Type of order (market/limit) */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (filled/part-filled/open) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_activity_strike_price FOREIGN KEY ("strike_price") REFERENCES options_data ("strike_price")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "asset_name" TEXT /* Name of the underlying asset */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the asset */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the asset */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the asset during the trading day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the asset during the trading day */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the asset traded */,
  "trading_day" TEXT /* Date of the trading day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "volatility_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volatility metric entry */,
  "strike_price" REAL /* The strike price associated with the volatility metrics */,
  "daily_hv" REAL /* The daily historical volatility */,
  "intra_hv" REAL /* The intraday historical volatility */,
  "implied_volatility" REAL /* The implied volatility for the option */,
  "volatility_surface" REAL /* The volatility surface value */,
  "volatility_smile" REAL /* The volatility smile value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_volatility_metrics_strike_price FOREIGN KEY ("strike_price") REFERENCES options_data ("strike_price")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time at which the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "strike_price" REAL /* The strike price for which the prediction is made */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date on which the prediction is made */,
  "predicted_price" REAL /* Predicted price of the option */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "model_used" TEXT /* Model used to make the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_strike_price FOREIGN KEY ("strike_price") REFERENCES options_data ("strike_price")
)

CREATE TABLE "prediction_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each predictive model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the predictive model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model (e.g., time series, machine learning) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the alert is sent */,
  "strike_price" REAL /* The strike price associated with the alert */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message content of the alert */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Time at which the alert was generated */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., volatility, price movement) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_strike_price FOREIGN KEY ("strike_price") REFERENCES options_data ("strike_price")
)

CREATE TABLE "option_chain" (
  "chain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each option chain entry */,
  "underlying_asset" TEXT /* The underlying asset symbol */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* The expiration date of the option */,
  "strike_price" REAL /* The strike price of the option */,
  "call_price" REAL /* The price of the call option */,
  "put_price" REAL /* The price of the put option */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE " Greeks" (
  "greek_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Greek entry */,
  "option_id" INTEGER /* ID of the option associated with the Greek */,
  "delta" REAL /* Delta value of the option */,
  "gamma" REAL /* Gamma value of the option */,
  "theta" REAL /* Theta value of the option */,
  "vega" REAL /* Vega value of the option */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("greek_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "volatility_surface" (
  "surface_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volatility surface entry */,
  "strike_price" REAL /* The strike price of the option */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* The expiration date of the option */,
  "volatility" REAL /* The volatility value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("surface_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_volatility_surface_strike_price FOREIGN KEY ("strike_price") REFERENCES options_data ("strike_price")
)

CREATE TABLE "volatility_smile" (
  "smile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volatility smile entry */,
  "strike_price" REAL /* The strike price of the option */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* The expiration date of the option */,
  "volatility" REAL /* The volatility value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("smile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_volatility_smile_strike_price FOREIGN KEY ("strike_price") REFERENCES options_data ("strike_price")
)

CREATE TABLE "implied_volatility" (
  "iv_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each implied volatility entry */,
  "strike_price" REAL /* The strike price of the option */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* The expiration date of the option */,
  "implied_volatility" REAL /* The implied volatility value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("iv_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_implied_volatility_strike_price FOREIGN KEY ("strike_price") REFERENCES options_data ("strike_price")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_volatility" (
  "hv_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical volatility entry */,
  "strike_price" REAL /* The strike price of the option */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* The expiration date of the option */,
  "historical_volatility" REAL /* The historical volatility value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hv_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_volatility_strike_price FOREIGN KEY ("strike_price") REFERENCES options_data ("strike_price")
)
